title: The Echoing Path
summary: After escaping the Rift of Echoes, the player finds themselves on the Echoing Path — a long, shifting corridor where past cycles bleed into the present. Echo‑shades of previous Codeborn appear, some warning the player, others attacking them. The player must navigate the unstable path, confront the Echo‑Shade of their own past self, and stabilize the corridor long enough to reach the next region of Act II.
